codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly merges Course Map and Lectures pages by redirecting /course-map to /lectures. The LecturesPage serves as the canonical view displaying all 10 lectures with proper metadata (topics, difficulty, exam relevance). Code changes are minimal and focused: added redirect import, modified courseMapRoute to use beforeLoad redirect, removed duplicate CourseMapPage component, and removed unused GraduationCap import.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architecture.md file's routing section still lists '/course-map' as a separate route. After this change, /course-map redirects to /lectures, so the architecture doc should be updated to reflect this (though documentation updates may be out of scope for this feature).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: architecture.md line: 'Routes: `/`, `/course-map`, `/lectures`, `/examples`...' - /course-map is now a redirect, not a distinct route

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps found. Worker followed the TanStack Router redirect pattern from the frontend-worker skill correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/routes.tsx - using beforeLoad: () => { throw redirect({ to: '/lectures' }) } is the correct pattern

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure correctly. The skillFeedback confirms followedProcedure: true with no deviations.
No new services or commands were used that would require updating services.yaml. The worker used standard npm run build, npm run lint, and agent-browser commands already documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All commands used are standard project commands

sharedStateObservations.observation: No knowledge gaps discovered. The worker correctly identified and removed the duplicate CourseMapPage component that was essentially identical to LecturesPage, which is consistent with the feature description.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git diff shows removal of CourseMapPage function

summary: Code review passes. The implementation correctly merges Course Map and Lectures into a unified page using /lectures as the canonical view. The /course-map route redirects to /lectures using TanStack Router's beforeLoad mechanism. All 10 lectures are visible with proper metadata. Build and lint pass. Browser verification confirms redirect works correctly. Minor note: architecture.md routing documentation may need updating to reflect that /course-map is now a redirect, but this is likely out of scope for the feature.
